# Nirvik Dhungana

> Frontend developer specializing in React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Based in Kathmandu, Nepal. Open to work.

## About
Nirvik Dhungana is a frontend developer focused on building accessible, responsive, and performant user interfaces. Currently open to work.

## Skills
- **Frontend:** React, TypeScript, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, HTML5, CSS3
- **Tools & DevOps:** Vite, Git, Docker, Figma, npm/pnpm
- **Backend/Database:** Node.js, Express, MongoDB

## Projects

### Pyrope Colorscheme
A warm, dark, jewel-toned colorscheme designed for deutan (red-green color deficient) vision. Built with consistent role assignments across every tool — VS Code, Neovim, Zed, Kate, KDE Plasma, Kitty, Alacritty, and Lichess.

- **Case study:** https://nirvikdhungana.com.np/projects/pyrope
- **Full details for AI/LLM consumption:** https://nirvikdhungana.com.np/llms-full.txt
- **Design philosophy:** Deuteranopia-aware. Warm pear-green accent (high red channel, low blue channel). Sapphire reserved for one meaning only (success). Lightness staggered as a backup cue. 7 explicit design rules.
- **Palette:** 4 backgrounds, 4 foregrounds, 5 accent/status colors, 4 decorative jewel tones, 16 ANSI colors.
- **Ports:** 8 applications supported with per-app theme files.
